race.comment: MAMMA MIA (4) broke her maiden at Goulburn before tackling better races her past couple, but her recent trial was very solid. Back to country grade today is a good move, as is the firmer footing of the Acton surface. Winkers replace the blinkers today and she can get back to winning ways today. TIMELESS GRACE (6) is racing in good order, coming through a strong form race at Albury last time out. JVO rides now from a good draw and she should land in a handy position. Right on the cusp of a win and rates highly on recent efforts. ENCAMPMENT (7) turned in a strong performance last start on the Riverside at Wagga last time out despite going under as the favourite. That form stacks up here and the visors go on now. Out in trip now looks to suit and he can go one better. SUNBURNT COUNTRY (10) is in the mix as well as he makes his debut for the local stable.
